question: List the names of regions that do not have any buildings.
sql: SELECT region.Name FROM region LEFT JOIN building ON region.Region_ID = building.Region_ID WHERE building.Building_ID IS NULL;

filters: Region_ID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT Region_ID FROM building)

semantic.reason: 过滤条件存在逻辑错误。原始问题要求查找无任何建筑物的地区，应使用LEFT JOIN结合IS NULL判断关联关系，而反向翻译描述错误地使用Region_ID NOT IN子查询，这会导致当building表无记录时返回空结果，与原始意图不符
